detail.title: [US TSP] Multi-login Matrix Console
detail.content:
# Product Overview As a key enhancement to the **Multilogin Matrix Console**, the **Multi-select shop to log in to Seller Center** feature provides a streamlined entry point for batch store management. By allowing TSP to pre-select multiple authorized stores from a centralized pop-up, the system carries these selections into a single Seller Center session. This enables TSP to switch between seller backends instantaneously without re-navigating, delivering a high-efficiency, matrix-style workplace. # Product Benefits The Multi-select shop to log in to Seller Center provides two primary advantages: * **Eliminated Repetitive Manual Entry:** By allowing loading multiple stores in a single action, the system replaces the tedious one-by-one access with efficient batch processing. This removes repetitive back-and-forth navigation and cuts down on redundant login time. * **Efficient Multi-Store Switching:** Seamless batch access replaces the need for back-and-forth navigation between stores. By removing the need for individual logins and fragmented steps, the Multi-select shop to log in to Seller Center tool streamlines high-volume store management and saves massive operational time. # User Guide | **Step** | **Process** | **Screenshot** | | --- | --- | --- | | 1 | **Enter the Multi-select shop to log in to Seller Center**

* Page entrance: Partner center - Manage services - Service orders - Multi-select shop to log in to Seller Center
* Click "Multi-select shop to log in to Seller Center" within the Partner Center to trigger a centralized selection pop-up.
* Page URL: https://partner.us.tiktokshop.com/leads-pool?page=1®ion=US&searchParam=lead_status%3D1%26seller_type%3D2&size=10
* *You can still use Single shop to log in to Seller Center, but you will only be able to manage one shop at a time. Therefore, we recommend using the new portal.*


| ![Image](https://p16-arcosite-sg.ibyteimg.com/tos-alisg-i-k9wyc2ijk0-sg/d0c9ac06130344e0a76b7ab732266a31~tplv-k9wyc2ijk0-image.image)
*New feature*
![Image](https://p16-arcosite-sg.ibyteimg.com/tos-alisg-i-k9wyc2ijk0-sg/6c4306e6260d4be99e49ec92ecd6d867~tplv-k9wyc2ijk0-image.image)
*Old feature* | | 2 | **Select shops in partner center**

* From your authorized list, select stores that you intend to manage in the current session.

| ![Image](https://p16-arcosite-sg.ibyteimg.com/tos-alisg-i-k9wyc2ijk0-sg/be50be03b1384e9bbb2afde63a4289f6~tplv-k9wyc2ijk0-image.image) | | 3 | **Switch shop in seller center**

* The system will automatically carry all selected store identities into the backend, allowing you to switch between different seller environments via the top navigation bar without redundant logins or re-navigation. | ![Image](https://p16-arcosite-sg.ibyteimg.com/tos-alisg-i-k9wyc2ijk0-sg/0799e6a48cd7420389d6375fc7d783b2~tplv-k9wyc2ijk0-image.image) | | 4 | **Exit seller management**

* Simply click the **Return to partner center** button — no need to log out.

| ![Image](https://p16-arcosite-sg.ibyteimg.com/tos-alisg-i-k9wyc2ijk0-sg/0994ea13777c43b9a39824ee3a8a7396~tplv-k9wyc2ijk0-image.image) |
